recommendations.title: Wedding Season
recommendations.overview: Pressured by their immigrant parents to find spouses, two Indian-Americans pretend to date in order to survive a summer of weddings – but find themselves falling for each other as they struggle to balance who they are with who their parents want them

recommendations.title: Showtime
recommendations.overview: A spoof of buddy cop movies where two very different cops are forced to team up on a new reality based T.V. cop show.

recommendations.title: The Major and the Minor
recommendations.overview: Low on funds, working-class girl Susan Applegate disguises herself as a youngster in order to pay half fare home. But little 'Sue Sue' finds herself in a whole heap of grownup trouble when she hides out in a compartment with handsome Major Philip Kir

recommendations.title: Marmaduke
recommendations.overview: When Phil and Debbie Winslow relocate from their native Kansas to the sunny climes of Orange County, their big-hearted, havoc-wreaking Great Dane gets a taste of the dog's life, California-style.

recommendations.title: Shanghai Noon
recommendations.overview: Chon Wang, a clumsy imperial guard, trails Princess Pei Pei when she's kidnapped from the Forbidden City and transported to America. Wang follows her captors to Nevada, where he teams up with an unlikely partner, outcast outlaw Roy O'Bannon, and trie

recommendations.title: Keanu
recommendations.overview: Friends hatch a plot to retrieve a stolen cat by posing as drug dealers for a street gang.

recommendations.title: Love, Guaranteed
recommendations.overview: A lawyer takes on a new client that wants to sue a dating website because it guarantees love.

recommendations.title: Waiting for Bojangles
recommendations.overview: A boy and his eccentric parents leave their home in Paris for a country house in Spain. As the mother descends deeper into her own mind, it's up to the boy and his father to keep her safe and happy.

recommendations.title: Detour
recommendations.overview: The life of Al Roberts, a pianist in a New York nightclub, turns into a nightmare when he decides to hitchhike to Los Angeles to visit his girlfriend.

recommendations.title: The Legend of Al, John and Jack
recommendations.overview: Hapless Depression-era gangsters Al, John and Jack find out their boss wants to get rid of them and come up with a plan to sell him to the FBI, but Al's short-term memory loss could make it difficult.
recommendations.director: Giovanni Storti, Massimo Venier, Giacomo Poretti, Aldo Baglio
